name: SCENARIO #5.3: Verify that initial drive price in "For work" taxi tariff card is the same as in details section in completed order popup.

steps.name: Fill in the "From" and "Where" field: from "'Хамовнический вал, 34'" to "'Зубовский бульвар, 37'".
Wait until the element is displayed: ('xpath', '//input[@placeholder="Хамовнический Вал, 18"]').
Fill the input field ('xpath', '//input[@placeholder="Хамовнический Вал, 18"]') with value: 'Хамовнический вал, 34'.
Wait until the element is displayed: ('xpath', '//input[@placeholder="Льва Толстого, 16"]').
Fill the input field ('xpath', '//input[@placeholder="Льва Толстого, 16"]') with value: 'Зубовский бульвар, 37'.
Click on the "Fast" tab in the route section.
Wait until the element is displayed: ('xpath', '//div[text()="Быстрый"]').
Click on element: ('xpath', '//div[text()="Быстрый"]').
Click on the "Get TAXI" button.
Wait until the element is clickable: ('xpath', '//button[text()="Вызвать такси"]').
Click on element: ('xpath', '//button[text()="Вызвать такси"]').
Click on "For work" taxi tariff.
Wait until the element is displayed: ('xpath', '//div[@class="tcard-title" and text()="Рабочий"]/parent::div').
Click on element: ('xpath', '//div[@class="tcard-title" and text()="Рабочий"]/parent::div').
Check the initial drive price for "For work" taxi tariff.
Wait until the element is displayed: ('xpath', '//ymaps[@class="ymaps-2-1-79-placemark-overlay ymaps-2-1-79-user-selection-none"]').
Wait until the element is displayed: ('xpath', '//div[@class="tcard-title" and text()="Рабочий"]/following-sibling::div[@class="tcard-price"]').
Get text of the element: ('xpath', '//div[@class="tcard-title" and text()="Рабочий"]/following-sibling::div[@class="tcard-price"]').
Click on "Order requirements" element.
Wait until the element is displayed: ('xpath', '//ymaps[@class="ymaps-2-1-79-placemark-overlay ymaps-2-1-79-user-selection-none"]').
Scroll to the element: ('xpath', '//div[@class="reqs-header"]').
Wait until the element is displayed: ('xpath', '//div[@class="reqs-header"]').
Click on element: ('xpath', '//div[@class="reqs-header"]').
Click on "Table for notebook" toggle.
Wait until the element is displayed: ('xpath', '//span[@class="slider round"]').
Click on element: ('xpath', '//span[@class="slider round"]').
Click on "Enter number and order" button.
Wait until the element is displayed: ('xpath', '//span[text()="Ввести номер и заказать"]/parent::button[@class="smart-button"]').
Click on element: ('xpath', '//span[text()="Ввести номер и заказать"]/parent::button[@class="smart-button"]').
Wait until the time counter is not displayed.
Wait until the element is not displayed on the page: ('xpath', '//div[@class="order-header-time"]').
Click on "Details" button in the completed order popup.
Wait until the element is displayed: ('xpath', '//div[text()="Детали"]/preceding-sibling::button').
Click on element: ('xpath', '//div[text()="Детали"]/preceding-sibling::button').
Check the drive price in details section in popup.
Wait until the element is displayed: ('xpath', '//div[text()="Еще про поездку"]/following-sibling::div[@class="o-d-sh"]').
Get text of the element: ('xpath', '//div[text()="Еще про поездку"]/following-sibling::div[@class="o-d-sh"]').
